name: Olives Bot Creator V2.2
description:
In this bot, you will be able to create your unique personalities and initial messages for your own bot creation.

A few important things!

I made this using the Janitor LLM, it may work well with other AIs but obviously, I don't know.

If you're going to use this bot then you can choose to credit me if you want, I don't honestly care all too much if you don't, but it would be quite lovely.

Requirements:

- 2k Max tokens with Janitor LLM is what I use, but depending on proxies, may vary

- That's suprisingly it


Update Log:

Update 2.1: Wednesday 9th December 2024

Revamped the Personality section:

- Added "Social Groups" section

- Renamed "Origins and Goals" to "Background and Aspirations"

- Added "Opinions and Beliefs" section

- Added "Nationality" section

- Revamped "Appearance" section

- Added a "Flaws" Section


Revamped the “Initial Message” section

- Added a way for the bot to make a message depending on if you're making a character or a scenario.


Revamped the Initial Message

- Added a template for creating multiple characters

- Added a template to create scenarios. e.g "Free Use World"


Added a new type of Bot Creation, Scenarios:

If you wish to create a scenario such as having powers, a free-use world, or practically anything that doesn't involve the need for one dependent character, then you can.

Update 2.2: Monday 27th April 2026

Revamped “Likes & Dislikes” Section:

- Removed “Likes and Dislikes” section

- Added “Likes” section for more detailed likes for your character

- Added “Dislikes” section for more detailed dislikes for your character

Removed Bot Rules:

- Bot no longer generates rules

- Increased bots efficiency

Revamped Initial Message Generation (Again):

- Bot now generates lengthier initial messages

- Bot no longer makes the user speak when making initial messages

- Make paragraph generation spliced and natural

- Given the user more creative freedom while generating initial messages (bot will take more into consid
creator: 01ive
